description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine plant_chng_4, and is implemented by a call to plant_chng_4. Use this API routine to modify the data of an existing plant that is part of a substation in the working case. If the substation has been split into multiple bus sections, use this API to designate the bus number and a node number within the bus section of the plant that the data is to be changed. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.2.0. ierr = plant_chng_3(ibus, inode, intgar, realar)

parameters.name: inode
parameters.description: Node number within the bus section for which the plant resides . (input; no default allowed).

intgar.description: IREG, remote bus number (0 to control voltage at bus IBUS) (0 by default).

realar.description: VS, scheduled voltage magnitude (1.0 by default).
RMPCT, percent of contributed reactive power (100.0 by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.

data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - invalid scheduled voltage - regulated bus not found - plant specified as remotely regulating itself - type code of regulated bus is not 1 or 2 - RMPCT is not positive.
